steps.title: Identify the decisive observation
steps.content: The passage's key finding: cuttlefish behavior shows their vision is “more like that of falcons and horses” (3D-capable animals), not octopuses or squid.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly expresses the core finding: Wardill's team discovered that cuttlefish, like falcons and horses, have 3D vision.

The other three either focus on irrelevant details (eye anatomy, equipment) or misrepresent what the team initially believed.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
